tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsFetchProcessorTypes
tools.description: Fetches processor types. Note that we do not use ListProcessorTypes here because it is not paginated.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsCreate
tools.description: Creates a processor from the type processor that the user chose. The processor will be at "ENABLED" state by default after its creation.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsDisable
tools.description: Disables a processor

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsEnable
tools.description: Enables a processor

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsHumanReviewConfigReviewDocument
tools.description: Send a document for Human Review. The input document should be processed by the specified processor.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsList
tools.description: Lists all processors which belong to this project.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsProcessorVersionsBatchProcess
tools.description: LRO endpoint to batch process many documents. The output is written to Cloud Storage as JSON in the [Document] format.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsProcessorVersionsDelete
tools.description: Deletes the processor version, all artifacts under the processor version will be deleted.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsProcessorVersionsDeploy
tools.description: Deploys the processor version.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsProcessorVersionsEvaluateProcessorVersion
tools.description: Evaluates a ProcessorVersion against annotated documents, producing an Evaluation.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsProcessorVersionsEvaluationsList
tools.description: Retrieves a set of evaluations for a given processor version.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsProcessorVersionsList
tools.description: Lists all versions of a processor.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsProcessorVersionsProcess
tools.description: Processes a single document.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsProcessorVersionsTrain
tools.description: Trains a new processor version. Operation metadata is returned as cloud_documentai_core.TrainProcessorVersionMetadata.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsProcessorVersionsUndeploy
tools.description: Undeploys the processor version.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorsSetDefaultProcessorVersion
tools.description: Set the default (active) version of a Processor that will be used in ProcessDocument and BatchProcessDocuments.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsLocationsProcessorTypesList
tools.description: Lists the processor types that exist.

tools.name: projects.documentaiProjectsOperationsGet
tools.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
